meta.title: David Botelho — Fullstack Developer
meta.description: Portfolio of David Botelho — Fullstack Developer specialized in React, Next.js, Node.js and scalable architectures.

hero.name: David Botelho
hero.description: Specialized in full stack web development, scalable APIs and modern experiences with React, Next.js and Node.js.

about.label: // ABOUT_ME
about.title: About Me
about.subtitle: Turning ideas into digital solutions.
about.bio1: Full Stack Developer with professional experience in web application development using React, Next.js and Node.js (AdonisJS and Express). Specialist in end-to-end feature implementation — API, interface and database — using JavaScript and TypeScript.
about.bio2: I have solid knowledge in SQL integration, Docker and agile methodologies, with focus on delivering scalable, high-quality solutions.

items.description: Web application development using React and Next.js on the front-end. Building and maintaining APIs with Node.js (AdonisJS and Express). End-to-end feature implementation with JavaScript and TypeScript, following best practices in architecture and performance.
Technical support for local network and computer maintenance. Spreadsheet automation and internal process improvements. Backups and production file organization.

skills.title: Technologies & Tools
skills.subtitle: The technologies I use to build digital products.

items.title: Diploma in Fullstack Development
items.description: Fullstack development with JavaScript, TypeScript, Next.js, React, Node.js, Express and PostgreSQL.

items.name: Spring Boot: Productivity in Java Development

projects.subtitle: A selection of projects that showcase my development approach.

items.title: E-commerce REST API
items.description: Robust API with product management, orders, payments and JWT authentication. Express + PostgreSQL.

items.title: Analytics Dashboard

items.description: Custom ERP for employee, project and financial management, with granular permissions.
